meta.title: Sanctuary Infrastructure - C2 Care Property Platform | Children's Home Leasing
meta.description: Sanctuary Infrastructure provides consented, refurbished Class C2 children's home properties to established operators across England. No planning risk. Ready for the operator's Ofsted application.
meta.keywords: C2 children's home property lease, consented care property, children's home operator lease, C2 planning consent, residential children's home property, care property platform England
meta.og_description: We create the home. You deliver the care. Consented C2 properties for established children's home operators.

hero.tagline: Sanctuary provides consented, Ofsted-ready Class C2 properties to established children's home operators across England. No planning risk. No operational involvement. Long-term partnership.
hero.model_line: The right property, in the right place, ready to operate.
hero.quote: Consented C2 stock is the scarcest resource in children's residential care. We remove that constraint.

how.body: Sanctuary does the hard work - planning, consent, refurbishment, compliance. You bring the care expertise, the LA relationships, and the Ofsted registration. Together we build something lasting.

steps.title: NDA & Initial Conversation
steps.desc: We share the full asset pack - property details, planning documentation, operator economics, and commercial terms - under our standard NDA. No commitment required at this stage.

steps.title: Due Diligence & Site Visit
steps.desc: We verify your operational track record - Ofsted history, LA pipeline, RM and RI in place, financial strength. You visit the property and review the full refurbishment specification.

steps.title: Heads of Terms
steps.desc: Fixed lease agreed. Base rent established. Upside participation clause confirmed. Lease documentation instructed. A clear, fair deal structure with no hidden costs.

steps.title: Handover - Ofsted-application ready
steps.desc: Sanctuary hands over a C2-consented, refurbished property, ready for you to begin your Ofsted registration. The 12-18 months of planning friction is already removed. Registration, staffing and mobilisation timelines are yours to lead.

steps.title: Long-Term Partnership
steps.desc: Preferred operators get first look at new consented stock as the pipeline grows. Sanctuary handles structural maintenance. You focus entirely on care delivery and placement outcomes.

assets.body: Two properties with confirmed Lawful Development Certificates. Seven further properties in planning or pre-application. All located in areas with strong LA commissioning demand.
assets.note: Full asset packs available following NDA execution. Site visits by arrangement.

metrics.val: In development — subject to Ofsted registration

contact.body: All enquiries begin with an NDA. The full asset pack - property details, planning documentation, operator economics, and proposed commercial terms - is shared following execution.
contact.note: We respond to every enquiry personally. We do not use brokers or intermediaries.

legal_lines: Sanctuary Trading Group Limited · Registered in England
This website does not constitute an offer or binding commitment
